# Mono-forward graph cutting

Sequential-decoder graph cutting: detach hidden states on a cut schedule and train each segment from a local goodness score (vocab CE for token models, next-patch-embedding prediction for encoder models). Selected with ``--mono-type``; default is off.

Registry: ``praxis.MONO_REGISTRY`` (3 entries)

## `cycle`

Detach after each full pass through the num_layers physical experts (one cut per
recurrent depth step).

## `final`

Detach once after the whole stack (single goodness at the top; the head trains alone
beyond it).

## `layer`

Detach after every expert call (totally flat; default mono-forward regime).
